titles.title: We Are Part of the Family

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We are part of the family, that’s been born again, Part of the family, whose love knows no end For Jesus has saved us and made us His own, Now we’re part of the family, that’s on its way home.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And sometimes we laugh together, Sometimes we cry; Sometimes we share together, heartaches and sighs Sometimes we dream together, of how It will be When we all get to heaven, God’s Family.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When a brother's in sorrow, we all feel his grief, When he'spassed through the valley, we all feel relieved Together in sunshine, together in rain, Together in victory, to His precious name.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And though some go before us, we’ll all meet again, Just inside the city, as we enter in, There will be no more parting, with Jesus we'll be, Together, forever, God's Family.
